plugins.name: dotnet-reflect
plugins.description: Inspect .NET NuGet/assembly API surfaces (signatures, XML docs, decompiled bodies, version diffs, and reverse find-usages) straight from the DLL on disk.

plugins.name: dotnet-source
plugins.description: ReSharper-style source navigation for the .NET solution you're editing — search, outline (private members included), god-class metrics, and semantic find-usages / impls / calls / unused, read from .cs with Roslyn. Works on code that doesn't compile.
